_format.description: Opponent deck for `build-deck --counter-file`. Only `cards` is required.

fields.name: Optional label shown in counter mode (defaults to the filename stem).
fields.energy_types: Optional 1-3 energy types; inferred from Pokémon in your cache when omitted.
fields.cards: Required. Each entry: card_id (TCGdex id) and count (1-2).

_format.note: Full decks saved with `build-deck --out` (including strategy and other LLM fields) also work.
